finding: Canonical queue state and append-only candidate updates require an explicit digest-bound review manifest before any compaction commit.

verification.runtime: Node test runner in isolated local runtime using byte-identical source and test contents

claim_states.observed: ACTIVE_QUEUE.json remains canonical while queue-updates files are append-only candidate state.
claim_states.inferred: Without exact input and result digests, reviewers cannot prove which candidate bytes a compaction decision evaluated.
claim_states.proposed: Generate and review a manifest before a separate canonical queue mutation commit.
claim_states.superseded: Implicit or search-result-based queue merging is not an acceptable compaction route.
claim_states.unresolved: No reviewed manifest has yet classified every current candidate update or mutated ACTIVE_QUEUE.json.

privacy_boundary: Public repository files and commit metadata only; raw private chat, health information, credentials, identifying personal data, and unreviewed uploads excluded.
limits: The builder does not decide whether a candidate deserves acceptance.
Digest coherence does not prove reviewer authority or claim truth.
No canonical queue mutation was performed.
